Fitness Tools

Free calculators and tools to help you track your fitness journey.

Popular

Workout Generator

Generate personalized AI workout plans tailored to your goals and equipment.

Macro Calculator

Calculate your daily protein, carbs, and fat targets for any fitness goal.

Calorie Calculator

Calculate your BMR, TDEE, and daily calorie needs based on your activity level.

Protein Calculator

Calculate your optimal daily protein intake based on weight and goals.

Heart Rate Calculator

Calculate your target heart rate zones for fat burn, cardio, and peak training.

Pace Calculator

Calculate your running pace, speed, and split times for any distance.

All Tools

Wilks Calculator

Calculate your Wilks score to compare strength across different body weights.

BMR Calculator

Calculate your Basal Metabolic Rate and estimated daily calorie burn.

Ideal Weight Calculator

Calculate your healthy weight range using BMI and medical formulas.

BMI Calculator

Calculate your Body Mass Index and understand your weight category.

1RM Calculator

Estimate your one-rep max based on your current lifting stats.

Workout Timer

Interval timer for HIIT, Tabata, and circuit training.

Plate Calculator

Figure out which plates to load for your target weight.

Calorie Calculator

Estimate your daily calorie needs based on your goals.

Body Fat Calculator

Estimate your body fat percentage using multiple methods.
